title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
